subject: feb 01 prod: sale to teco gas processing

emails.subject: Feb 01 Prod: Sale to Teco Gas Processing
emails.subject_base: Feb 01 Prod: Sale to Teco Gas Processing
emails.body: Feb 01 Prod: Sale to Teco Gas Processing Sale Deal 235670 Expired 12/00 Julie- This deal has expired for Teco Gas Processing, but we did have a sale in 02/01. Should this deal be extended? Pls let me know ,so that I can redraft the sale through Unify. Katherine 5-8643 Unable to draft volume in Unify due to the expired deal ticket;

emails.subject: Re: Feb 01 Prod: Sale to Teco Gas Processing
emails.subject_base: Feb 01 Prod: Sale to Teco Gas Processing
emails.body: Re: Feb 01 Prod: Sale to Teco Gas Processing I believe the counterparty changed effective 2/1/01 to El Paso Merchant Energy. See deals 637225 and 637234. D Katherine Herrera@ENRON 04/04/2001 09:57 AM
